calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-30-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders balance case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Progress Report On The Deposit Of Money Into A Blocked Account For The Minor, Jacob M. Spiegel
Off Calendar Oct-09-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-27-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed
Off Calendar Aug-23-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of the Minor, Jacob M. Spiegel.
Dept. 514. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Paul A Spiegel, Esq. appeared with petitioner Marc N. Zimmerman, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minor, Jacob M. Spiegel, who was not present at this morning's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and testified.
Order appointing Mr. Zimmerman Guardian ad Litem for the minor was filed on June 27, 2018.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the compromise is approved as follows:

Settlement Amount - $5,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $0.00.
Medical Bills/Liens - $0.00.
Costs - $0.00.

The net balance of $5,000.00 shall be deposited into a blocked account with City National Bank, located at 150 California Street, Suite 100, San Francisco, CA 94133. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minors reach the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is CONTINUED to October 11, 2018 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for Progress Report on the Status of the deposit of money into a Blocked Account.
